examples: Simply put, it's this era's preeminent technology company.
Born in Basra, al-Haytham was a preeminent thinker of his age.
The dollar's preeminent position may be the first casualty of this shift.
More recently, the X-Men title tackled the preeminent gender issue of our day: gay marriage.
Assured, advantaged access to space must be the preeminent task for the immediate future.
